author: Urban Milwaukee
title: WEAC Recommends Judge Susan Crawford for Supreme Court » Urban Milwaukee
text:
WEAC Recommends Judge Susan Crawford for Supreme Court
The [Wisconsin Education Association Council](https://urbanmilwaukee.com/business/wisconsin-education-association-council), representing public school educators in the state, is recommending Judge [Susan Crawford](https://urbanmilwaukee.com/people/susan-crawford) for [Wisconsin Supreme Court](https://urbanmilwaukee.com/government/wisconsin-supreme-court). In earning the recommendation, educator-members cited Crawford’s strong record of protecting fairness and impartiality on the Court.
[Peggy Wirtz-Olsen](https://urbanmilwaukee.com/people/peggy-wirtz-olsen), a teacher and WEAC President. “Judge Crawford has demonstrated her ability to be impartial, uphold the constitution and keep our communities and schools safe. She shares our values, including hard work and the importance of a good education for every Wisconsin student – no exceptions.”
NOTE: This press release was submitted to Urban Milwaukee and was not written by an Urban Milwaukee writer. While it is believed to be reliable, Urban Milwaukee does not guarantee its accuracy or completeness.
